summary: Iteration 52: Cowellmedi INNO Drilling Protocol Testing - 20/20 tests PASSED (100%). All Cowellmedi INNO Submerged and INNO Submerged Narrow drilling protocol features verified working correctly. Regression tests for MIS Lance+, Ankylos C/X, and B&B Dental 3P also passed.

frontend_issues.note: Backend-only testing per request. Frontend has local protocol generation in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx for Cowellmedi INNO systems.

Feature 2 (GET /api/drilling-protocols/available): PASS - Cowellmedi INNO Submerged Narrow listed with lengths=[8, 10, 12, 14]
Feature 3 (INNO Submerged D1 4.0mm): PASS - Full drilling + mandatory Countersink + optional Bone Tap
Feature 4 (INNO Submerged D1 3.5mm): PASS - Full sequence with final drill 3.2mm
Feature 5 (INNO Submerged D1 5.0mm): PASS - Full sequence with all intermediate drills (2.8, 3.2, 3.6, 4.2, 4.8)
Feature 6 (INNO Submerged D2 4.5mm): PASS - Countersink present, NO Bone Tap
Feature 7 (INNO Submerged D3 4.0mm): PASS - Under-preparation stops at 3.2mm (skips 3.6mm)
Feature 8 (INNO Submerged D4 5.0mm): PASS - Under-preparation stops at 4.2mm (skips 4.8mm)
Feature 9 (INNO Submerged D3 3.5mm): PASS - Under-preparation stops at 2.8mm (skips 3.2mm)
Feature 10 (INNO Narrow D1 3.3mm): PASS - Pilot + 2.8 + Final Drill 3.3mm + Implant
Feature 11 (INNO Narrow D2 3.1mm): PASS - Pilot + 2.8 + Final Drill 3.1mm + Implant
Feature 12 (INNO Narrow D3 3.3mm): PASS - Under-preparation skips final drill
Feature 13 (INNO Narrow D4 3.1mm): PASS - Under-preparation skips final drill
Feature 14 (Depth equals length): PASS - All Cowellmedi systems use depth = implant length (no offset)
Feature 15 (Insertion torque): PASS - 25-45 Ncm in notes
Feature 16 (PDF export INNO Submerged): PASS - Returns valid PDF
Feature 17 (PDF export INNO Narrow): PASS - Returns valid PDF
Feature 18 (MIS Lance+ regression): PASS - Still works correctly
Feature 19 (Ankylos C/X regression): PASS - Still works correctly
Feature 20 (B&B Dental 3P regression): PASS - Still works correctly
seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cowellmedi INNO drilling protocols fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: DRILLING_PROTOCOLS['Cowellmedi|INNO Submerged'] at line 4498 and DRILLING_PROTOCOLS['Cowellmedi|INNO Submerged Narrow'] at line 4519 in server.py, _generate_cowellmedi_protocol function at line 4527. Protocol rules: (1) Depth = Implant Length (no offset), (2) D1 gets full drilling + mandatory Countersink + optional Bone Tap, (3) D2 gets full drilling + Countersink (if cortical thick) but NO Bone Tap, (4) D3/D4 gets under-preparation (skip final drill for primary stability). INNO Submerged drill library: Round, 2.0 (pilot), 2.8, 3.2, 3.6, 4.2, 4.8. INNO Narrow drill library: Round, 2.0 (pilot), 2.8. Final drill mapping for Submerged: 3.5→3.2, 4.0→3.6, 4.5→4.2, 5.0→4.8. Under-prep mapping for Submerged: 3.5→2.8, 4.0→3.2, 4.5→3.6, 5.0→4.2. Narrow always stops at 2.8 for soft bone. Insertion torque: 25-45 Ncm. Frontend has local protocol generation in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx (lines 114-160) matching backend logic.

tested_features.available_protocols_inno_submerged: PASS - Cowellmedi INNO Submerged in available protocols with correct lengths
tested_features.available_protocols_inno_narrow: PASS - Cowellmedi INNO Submerged Narrow in available protocols with correct lengths
tested_features.d1_countersink_and_bone_tap: PASS - D1 includes mandatory Countersink and optional Bone Tap
tested_features.d2_countersink_no_bone_tap: PASS - D2 includes Countersink but NO Bone Tap
tested_features.d3_d4_under_preparation: PASS - D3/D4 skip final drill for primary stability
tested_features.depth_equals_length: PASS - No offset (unlike B&B Dental which uses length+0.5 for drilling)
tested_features.pdf_export: PASS - Both systems return valid PDF

tested_endpoints.GET /api/drilling-protocols/available: 200 - Returns both Cowellmedi INNO systems with correct metadata
tested_endpoints.POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate: 200 - Generates correct protocol for all diameters, lengths, and bone densities
